title: Immunotherapy surface-antigen target cards
context: Backlog/future: immunotherapy surface-antigen target cards. MEDIUM risk-tier research reference; coordinate with the ewing-immunotherapy-target-catalog project to avoid duplication. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Draft immunotherapy surface-antigen target cards as research references (cited + graded, no individual clinical instruction), coordinating with ewing-immunotherapy-target-catalog to avoid duplication, with domain-reviewer sign-off recorded.
acceptanceCriteria: Each surface-antigen target card is cited + provenance-backed and evidence-graded; carries the 'research reference - not clinical guidance' frame
No individual clinical instruction; coordinated with ewing-immunotherapy-target-catalog to avoid duplication
Domain-reviewer sign-off recorded (reviewer TO BE SECURED)
